name: MYOS | TRIO OF DECEIT
description:
Make your own scenario! 🟪🟦🟥

So, decided to make a MYOS bot! :3 With all three of them here hehe, nothing much to say. I do have ideas for this chat but wanted to see how you'll like a multiple characters myos (⁠≧⁠▽⁠≦⁠)

Just gonna say it, there is Candy Apple Cookie here but she won't have her own bot (sadly) bc there's no possible scenario where it won't be weird. But planning on making her duo with Black Sapphire Cookie

Bot avatar is fanart made by Sanwawans on Twitter/X! Go check it out here!

Anyway, have some chat ideas!

  • You're joining them! Inflirtation maybe or you're just tired of the proper world of truth? How do they react?

  • Marry SMC or BSC, I know some of you want that (⁠ㆁ⁠ω⁠ㆁ⁠)

  • You're the new guardian of the tree and came to seal SMC again!

  • Someone's dying perhaps?

  • Try adopting CAC see how that goes xD

  • You're one of the heroes! Or you came with Pure Vanilla to stop them!

Hope that helps! (⁠✿⁠^⁠‿⁠^⁠)
creator: BeeIsHeree
